title: UI and Content Logic Carry-forward Audit

visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.observation: Homepage shows internal/developer-facing copy: UI Step 3 Integration.
visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.treatment: Must be replaced or consciously approved as public-facing copy before go-live.

visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.observation: Sports Desk cards show Loading / Fetching placeholder states.
visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.treatment: Must resolve with stable fallback, hide module, or mark as prepared surface before go-live.

visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.observation: Updated logic requires 10 daily signals by default, split as 6 India and 4 International.
visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.treatment: AG56.8 must check that Daily Signal / First Light logic reflects this rule or carries a clear deferral.

visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.observation: Homepage must align to Discover → Read → Reflect, not internal staging language.
visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.treatment: AG56.8 must check public homepage copy against AG45 doctrine.

visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.observation: Word/Panchang/Reflection/Vedic preview must avoid invented mantra, unsupported claims, deterministic astrology or live calculation claims.
visible_ui_observations_to_carry_forward.treatment: AG56.8 must consume AG56.6 safety boundary and decide if current preview posture is acceptable.

blocking_policy_for_ag56_8: AG56.8 may still be generated as a decision stage, but it must not declare full live approval unless these open watch items are resolved or explicitly deferred with a defect list.
